title: wedelia stuebelii
intro: Wedelia stuebelii, also known as Yellow Flax or Golden Chrysanthemum, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Wedelia stuebelii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Wedelia stuebelii is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and its flowers and leaves can be dried or powdered for use in medicinal applications.
